code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a partial icon fragment beside six labeled full-icon options
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_partial_icon_match_label: Which labeled full icon does the partial fragment come from?
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with keys "source_fragment" and "selected_option", each mapped to a [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option letter as a string
